---
title: "University of Washington Causal Reading Group talk"
date: 2025-11-17
description: "Talk. Using Causal Inference to Unmask Racial Discrimination in Traffic Enforcement via Proxies at the University of Washington Causal Reading Group."
categories:
  - talks
  - policing
---

I gave a talk at the University of Washington Causal Reading Group on _"Using Causal Inference to Unmask Racial Discrimination in Traffic Enforcement via Proxies."_ The event was held over Zoom.
